name: io.github.stabgan/openrouter-multimodal
description: Chat with 300+ LLMs via OpenRouter. Analyze and generate images, audio, and video from MCP.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenRouter API key. Get one free at https://openrouter.ai/keys

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_DEFAULT_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Default model for chat + analyze tools. Defaults to nvidia/nemotron-nano-12b-v2-vl:free.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_OUTPUT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Sandbox root for save_path on generate_* tools. Defaults to the current working directory.

environmentVariables.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenRouter API key. Get one free at https://openrouter.ai/keys
